entity: Dirk Nowitzki career regular-season total points = 31,560 (BBR #6 all-time). Warehouse SUM(avg_pts*gp) undercounts at 30,610 (delta 950)

query_target.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(avg_pts * gp)) AS career_pts FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 1717 AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: REGRESSION: warehouse sums to 30,610 PTS but BBR's official Dirk Nowitzki career regular-season total is 31,560. The 950-point gap over 21 seasons is consistent with the same agg_player_season gap pattern. Flip to stable when the warehouse value equals 31,560.
